title: Funding Readiness Results Explained
meta_description: Understand what your funding readiness score means, what can block a file, and what next step may make sense after the scorecard.

hero.headline: Your score explains the conversation your file is ready for.
hero.body: The result is an educational estimate based on your answers. It helps identify next steps, not a funding decision.

tier_blocks.label: Selective-fit profile
tier_blocks.next_step: Reduce blockers and tighten the ask

guardrails: Do not expose providers, affiliate links, apply links, commissions, private contacts, routing logic, underwriting notes, credentials, or real borrower PII.
Do not imply approval, final eligibility, best rates, or instant funding.
Link CTAs to public-safe internal routes only.
